PowerShell(Get-Process -Name mysqld -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue)

PowerShell(Start-Process -FilePath "C:\\xampp-php8.2-new\\mysql\\bin\\mysqld.exe" -ArgumentList "--defaults-file=C:\\xampp-php8.2-new\\mysql\\bin\\my.ini" -WorkingDirectory "C:\\xampp-php8.2-new\\mysql\\bin" -WindowStyle Hidden)
PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3306 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue)

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost/" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; "HTTP $\($r.StatusCode\) - Apache is responding" } catch { "Apache HTTP test failed: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost/phpmyadmin/" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; "HTTP $\($r.StatusCode\) - phpMyAdmin is responding \($\($r.RawContentLength\) bytes\)" } catch { "phpMyAdmin test failed: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })
PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -State Listen | Where-Object { $_.LocalPort -in 80,443,3306 } | Select-Object LocalAddress, LocalPort, OwningProcess | Format-Table -AutoSize)

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost/phpmyadmin/" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 30; "HTTP $\($r.StatusCode\) - phpMyAdmin responding \($\($r.RawContentLength\) bytes\)" } catch { "phpMyAdmin failed: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell(try { $tcp = New-Object System.Net.Sockets.TcpClient; $tcp.Connect\("127.0.0.1", 3306\); "MySQL accepts IPv4 connections on 127.0.0.1:3306"; $tcp.Close\(\) } catch { "IPv4 connect failed: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1/phpmyadmin/" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 60; "HTTP $\($r.StatusCode\) via 127.0.0.1 \($\($r.RawContentLength\) bytes\)" } catch { "127.0.0.1 also timed out: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1/phpinfo-test.php" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 15; "PHP test: HTTP $\($r.StatusCode\) - body: $\($r.Content\)" } catch { "PHP test failed: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })
PowerShell($out = & "C:\\xampp-php8.2-new\\mysql\\bin\\mysql.exe" -u root -h 127.0.0.1 -P 3306 --connect-timeout=10 -e "SELECT VERSION\(\), NOW\(\);" 2>&1; "Exit code: $LASTEXITCODE"; $out)

PowerShell(Stop-Process -Id 3528 -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; $remaining = Get-Process -Name mysqld -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($remaining\) { "Still running: $\($remaining.Id -join ','\)" } else { "All mysqld processes stopped." })

PowerShell($src = "C:\\xampp-php8.2-new\\mysql\\data - Copy \(2\)"; $dst = "C:\\xampp-php8.2-new\\mysql\\data"; $sw = [System.Diagnostics.Stopwatch]::StartNew\(\); Copy-Item -Path $src -Destination $dst -Recurse -Force; $sw.Stop\(\); "Copy finished in $\([math]::Round\($sw.Elapsed.TotalSeconds,1\)\)s"; $size = \(Get-ChildItem $dst -Recurse -File | Measure-Object -Property Length -Sum\).Sum; "New data folder: $\([math]::Round\($size/1MB,1\)\) MB")

PowerShell(Start-Process -FilePath "C:\\xampp-php8.2-new\\mysql\\bin\\mysqld.exe" -ArgumentList "--defaults-file=C:\\xampp-php8.2-new\\mysql\\bin\\my.ini" -WorkingDirectory "C:\\xampp-php8.2-new\\mysql\\bin" -WindowStyle Hidden; Start-Sleep -Seconds 6; $proc = Get-Process -Name mysqld -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($proc\) { "mysqld running: PID $\($proc.Id\), RAM $\([math]::Round\($proc.WorkingSet64/1MB,1\)\) MB" } else { "mysqld FAILED to start" })
PowerShell($out = & "C:\\xampp-php8.2-new\\mysql\\bin\\mysql.exe" -u root -h 127.0.0.1 -P 3306 --connect-timeout=10 -e "SELECT VERSION\(\) AS v; SHOW DATABASES;" 2>&1; "Exit: $LASTEXITCODE"; $out)

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost/phpmyadmin/" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 30; "phpMyAdmin: HTTP $\($r.StatusCode\), $\($r.RawContentLength\) bytes" } catch { "phpMyAdmin still failing: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell($proc = Get-Process -Name httpd -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($proc\) { "Apache running: $\($proc.Count\) processes" } else { "Apache is DOWN - restarting..." ; Start-Process -FilePath "C:\\xampp-php8.2-new\\apache\\bin\\httpd.exe" -WorkingDirectory "C:\\xampp-php8.2-new\\apache" -WindowStyle Hidden; Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; $p2 = Get-Process -Name httpd -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($p2\) { "Apache restarted: $\($p2.Count\) processes \(PIDs: $\($p2.Id -join ','\)\)" } else { "Apache restart FAILED" } })

PowerShell(try { $r1 = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost/" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 10; "Root: HTTP $\($r1.StatusCode\)" } catch { "Root failed: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" }; try { $r2 = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost/phpmyadmin/" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 30; "phpMyAdmin: HTTP $\($r2.StatusCode\), $\($r2.RawContentLength\) bytes" } catch { "phpMyAdmin failed: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell(Write-Output "=== httpd processes ==="; Get-Process -Name httpd -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Id, StartTime, @{N='RAM_MB';E={[math]::Round\($_.WorkingSet64/1MB,1\)}}; Write-Output "=== Listeners on 80/443 ==="; Get-NetTCPConnection -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.LocalPort -in 80,443 } | Select-Object LocalAddress, LocalPort, OwningProcess; Write-Output "=== Last 15 lines of Apache error log ==="; Get-Content "C:\\xampp-php8.2-new\\apache\\logs\\error.log" -Tail 15)

PowerShell(Get-Process -Name httpd -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; Start-Process -FilePath "C:\\xampp-php8.2-new\\apache\\bin\\httpd.exe" -WorkingDirectory "C:\\xampp-php8.2-new\\apache" -WindowStyle Hidden; Start-Sleep -Seconds 4; Write-Output "=== Apache procs ==="; Get-Process -Name httpd -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Id, @{N='RAM_MB';E={[math]::Round\($_.WorkingSet64/1MB,1\)}}; Write-Output "=== Port 80 listener ==="; Get-NetTCPConnection -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.LocalPort -eq 80 } | Select-Object LocalAddress, LocalPort, OwningProcess)

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; Write-Output "=== Port 80 listeners \(anywhere\) ==="; Get-NetTCPConnection -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.LocalPort -eq 80 }; Write-Output "=== Last 10 lines of Apache error log ==="; Get-Content "C:\\xampp-php8.2-new\\apache\\logs\\error.log" -Tail 10)

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost/phpmyadmin/" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 30; "phpMyAdmin: HTTP $\($r.StatusCode\), $\($r.RawContentLength\) bytes - first 200 chars of body:"; $r.Content.Substring\(0, [Math]::Min\(200, $r.Content.Length\)\) } catch { "Failed: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })
